purpose: Illustrative accreditation-framework issuer set for interoperability and status tests. Two independent issuer implementations, matching the minimum plugfest topology in README.md.

expected_verifier_behaviour.presentation_after_suspension_effective_: reject with deterministic reason code (see CT-UC012-POS-01)

known_gaps: status-time semantics (issuance-time vs presentation-time vs grace period) not yet ratified — this fixture assumes presentation-time
no privacy-preserving status-query mechanism has been selected (see CT-UC012-NEG-02)
